top.title: Eight students arrested in Kenya after suspected deadly school arson attack
top.summary: Sixteen pupils died in the fire that ripped through a dormitory while they were asleep.

top.title: US and Iran 'very close' to deal but 'not there yet', Vance says
top.summary: US officials earlier told the BBC that the framework of a ceasefire extension deal had been agreed, pending the approval of Trump and Iran's leadership.

top.title: Netanyahu says he has directed IDF to increase control of Gaza to 70%
top.summary: The expansion in control by Israel would contradict the terms of the ceasefire  Israel and Hamas agreed to in October 2025.

top.title: Humanoid robots 'the future' of car making, says BMW
top.summary: BMW is introducing humanoid robots to a car plant in Europe, building on similar projects in the US.

top.title: California Attorney General sues 23andMe successor for 2023 data breach
top.summary: Attorney General Rob Bonta alleges the company lied about the breach's severity.

top.title: Valve hikes Steam Deck prices by more than 40%, blaming rising costs
top.summary: The gaming giant said the handheld had not changed but the rise reflected "the current state of component costs"
